feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Defying the prophecy
entry.summary:
Author: Transjellyfishboy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,881Chapters: 3/23Kudos: 3

Summary: This is a Merlin rewrite and I'm gonna be honest I have a lot of hopes and expectations for this so not sure if I'll ever finish.Merlin finds out about the prophecy and how things are supposed to play out and actively steers against it all. Basically imagine if Merlin saw everything how it played out in the show and then he, rethinks what to do and how to choose.

entry.title: Long Long Ago in the Here and Now
entry.summary:
Author: Love_to_Ship7

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,663Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Merlin Emrys sat and stared at the new student info forms on his desk, while the children read quietly to themselves. After over fifteen hundred years, he couldn't allow the tiniest spark of hope to take shape until he knew for sure. The parents of the brother and sister joining his class were likely history buffs with a passion for Arthurian legends and nothing more. Nothing more than another heartbreak, just like the last twenty he'd followed up on in almost as many decades. He checked to see his students were still working, before taking a moment to close his eyes and remember. Faces, voices, and scents ran through his mind, and he longed for them to be more than distant memories. Damn his lonely heart. It was such a glutton for punishment.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Fate's Own Way
entry.summary:
Author: notyourstrawberrymilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,362Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 326

Summary: When his father informs Arthur he must choose a queen, Arthur wants to enjoy his last days of freedom. On his trip, he is found wounded by druids who take him back to their camp where he is tortured (for lack of a better word) for information on Camelot by the chief druid, a man named Emrys. Despite their unconventional relationship - and having never seen the man with his own eyes - Arthur begins to fall for Emrys and the druid way of life. But with the threat of Uther finding the druids, Arthur must decide where his true loyalties lie. Spotify playlist ***WARNING! Non-con sexual elements and graphic depictions of violence.

entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,179Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 11

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but sets in a motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy.

entry.title: The Bruise
entry.summary:
Author: hpalsowritessecretly

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,560Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 29

Summary: Merlin trips and Arthur becomes fixated on the resulting bruise. Meanwhile, Merlin tries to distract Arthur from finding out about his magic with some convoluted 4D chess. This is 30% them bickering and 70% vague smut. They don’t explicitly have sex but they do jerk each other off a few times.

entry.title: Snaidhm na Dàn: The Knot of Fate
entry.summary:
Author: jessicalexa02

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,152Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Across generations, Minerva McGonagall has watched the same story unfold.Two souls, always drawn together. Always separated too soon. They called it Snaidhm na Dàn, the knot of fate.A bond that could not be broken. Only left unfinished.From old legends to names history remembers best. Potter and Black or Potter and Malfoy, the pattern never changes.They meet.They choose.They lose.A knot of fate, unfinished and unbroken, weaving itself through time.Until, one day, something shifts. And the knot, at last, begins to close.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,915Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 96

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

entry.title: Arthur Pendragon's Incredible Observation Skills (sort of)
entry.summary:
Author: Diana_Prallon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,758Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: “It might be a little awkward,” the king conceded, with a grandiloquent nod. “Which was why I asked you first.” “Because this is not awkward at all,” Merlin complained, rolling his eyes, and looking away from the king. “You made it awkward. You said you were going to give me a straight answer, then started spluttering denials with questionable wording.” “Questionable wording?” Merlin asked, shaking his head. “There was nothing—” In which Arthur asks an objective question, Merlin absolutely won't answer (even if he promised), and neither of them wants to back down. Also, it may be slightly—very slightly—Gwen's fault, but also not her fault because she had no way of knowing they were this oblivious.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,475Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 30

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury. Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own . Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other. There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet. But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it. --------------------------- A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed)Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.

entry.title: 500 Miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,565Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 44

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back. Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t. The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word *traitor.* A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: Found a place so safe
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,084Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 9

Summary: It had been a week since Morgana returned to Camelot. A week of smiling at Uther. A week of playing the role of the perfect Lady the King had tried to mould her into. A week of reconnecting with Arthur after years of keeping him at arm’s length. She found that he was not the mirror of Uther she had once thought him to be. For the first time in a long while, she understood what Merlin saw in him. She had had her doubts, but now she was sure of it. Arthur could be a great King someday, but he needed all the help he could get, and one part of helping him was telling him the truth.

entry.title: I'll Save You A Seat
entry.summary:
Author: sherrwin

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,858Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 9

Summary: This short story entails CEO Arthur Pendragon and the one that got away: Merlin Emrys.With a Little Twist: Along with Merlin, follows two young boys of his. His tremendous bundles of joy yet bane of his existence.Together, the two boys unintentionally pull the two lost lovers back together in the absolute most bizarre place: An airplanes’ first class cabin. What else could be said in that situation but, “That’s my son!" Who just so happens to grow up with a father like Merlin, one out of the ordinary.Disclaimer: Merlin has his magic solely for the plot however he wont be using it.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,543Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 201

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

entry.title: The Drying of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Marshmellow0v0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,007Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: After Gwen discovers that Camelot’s entire water supply has vanished, Arthur begins to panic. He knows what the cause of this is and doesn't know how to stop it. That goddamn unicorn. Arthur regrets not being more persistent in finding the sorcerer like he was told when he sees how Merlin is suffering. Merlin has been giving his food and water away and now he's the one that will have to face the consequences.

entry.title: If I told you myself
entry.summary:
Author: riverray

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 131,784Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 1,120

Summary: Merlin can’t remember the last time he’s locked his bedroom door, if ever. But he chooses not to think about it. He merely sulks his way back to his bed, taking a moment to contemplate taking off his trousers and tunic from the night before. He decides not to think about that either. Instead, he decides not to think at all. He just falls back into his bed, covers up his body more so in shame than for warmth, and closes his eyes.   Basically Merlin is sexually assaulted and this story follows how he and everyone else deals with it. Spoiler alert: THEY DON'T HANDLE IT WELL.

  • Protective Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • Suicidal Thoughts
  • this will have a happy ending
  • despite the not so happy journey getting there

entry.title: city of secrets
entry.summary:
Author: aeternanyx

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,937Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: Merlin’s a Warlock, posing as a mundane in the heart of the London Institute. He’s searching for answers—but all he finds are more secrets.
